---
name: GUI issue or feature request
about: Report an issue or request a feature related to the Rincoin Core GUI (Qt wallet)
title: '[GUI] '
labels: GUI
assignees: ''

---

<!--
Rincoin Core is a single integrated repository covering consensus,
node, wallet, and GUI. Unlike Bitcoin Core, there is no separate
"rincoin-core/gui" repository — please file GUI issues here.

Before submitting, please check existing issues under the "GUI" label
to avoid duplicates:

  https://github.com/Rin-coin/rincoin/issues?q=label%3AGUI

For security-sensitive GUI issues (e.g., issues that could leak
private keys, addresses, or balances), do NOT open a public issue.
Refer to SECURITY.md in the repository root and contact
info@rincoin.org (GPG-encrypted preferred) instead.
-->

**Type of report**

<!-- Bug / Feature request / UX improvement / Translation / Other -->

**Expected behavior**

<!-- What did you expect the GUI to do? -->

**Actual behavior**

<!-- What did the GUI actually do?
     Please attach a screenshot or screen recording if possible. -->

**To reproduce**

<!-- Steps to reproduce the issue, including which menu paths,
     dialogs, or buttons were used. -->

**System information**

<!-- Rincoin Core version (Help → About, or `rincoin-qt --version`). -->

<!-- Operating system and version. -->

<!-- If Linux, your desktop environment and graphical shell
     (e.g., GNOME on Wayland, KDE Plasma on X11, Xfce on X11). -->

<!-- Display configuration (HiDPI / scaling factor / multi-monitor)
     if relevant to the issue. -->

**Additional context**

<!-- Any extra information that might help: relevant `debug.log` lines,
     locale / language setting, theme, accessibility settings, etc.
     Please redact wallet addresses, transaction IDs, and balances
     from screenshots. -->
